geography.data_source: Vasai-Virar City Municipal Corporation ward boundaries; area from VVCMC Development Plan; includes Vasai, Virar, Nallasopara, Nalasopara nodes

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Vasai-Virar city; density = population/area (much lower than island city reflecting semi-urban sprawl); household size from NSSO 76th Round Palghar district; literacy from Census 2011 Vasai-Virar; SC/ST from Census 2011

income_profile.data_source: Median from PLFS 2022-23 Palghar district urban area; distribution left-skewed reflecting lower income periurban belt; informal rate from NSSO 78th Round Palghar district; occupations reflect mix of agricultural hinterland, construction boom, and commuter service economy

commute_profile.data_source: Extreme commute distance — Virar to Churchgate is ~60km; Western Railway is only viable option; no metro lines anywhere near; MCTS 2016 + VVCMC transport survey; 95-min average reflects peak-hour crush conditions on fast trains; car ownership low from income constraints

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Very high fare sensitivity — long commute costs are a major household expense; lowest railway trust reflecting chronic overcrowding, delays, and safety issues on Virar-Churchgate corridor; low diffusion speed from limited digital infrastructure; high political mobilisation from commuter anger and local political activism; Lokniti-CSDS 2024 Palghar sub-sample

social_network_parameters.data_source: Higher clustering from village-to-town transition community structures; high connections from dense affordable housing society networks; very low cross-income bridging reflecting income homogeneity in dormitory belt; low tier2 density from periurban political structure

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Vendors at Virar station — terminal station of Western Railway suburban services; footfall from WR Virar station boarding data (~450K daily)
Nallasopara station area market — one of the fastest growing suburban centres; footfall from WR station data + BEST extended services
Vasai Road wholesale provisions market serving periurban belt; VVCMC market license data
Vasai-Arnala fishing economy — traditional Koli community; Maharashtra Fisheries Department Palghar district data; low transit dependency as location-fixed

Active construction economy in rapidly developing Vasai-Virar corridor; employment estimated from RERA registered project data for Vasai-Virar (2022-2024) and typical construction workforce per project
Agricultural produce market serving remaining farming communities in Vasai-Virar hinterland; APMC Palghar district data

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Periurban/Low Connectivity template from AGENT_SPEC.md; Vasai-Virar is the archetypal far commuter belt with limited connectivity; sum = 1.00

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Tier 2 counts from VVCMC elected representatives, Western Railway commuter association records (Virar Commuters' Association), community organisation mapping, and school density data for Palghar district
